name: Taiwan Fructose Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Fructose Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells syrup products in Taiwan. The company's products comprise fructose, maltose, isomalto-oligo saccharides, and maltodextrin syrups, as well as non-dairy creamers, vegetable oil powder, dextrose, and sorbitol. Its products are used in a range of applications, including beverages, dairy products, iced products, desserts, bakery food, soy sauces, health foods, candy, jams and jellies, sachima, bean fillings, chewing gums, candied fruits, biscuits, coffee, milk tea, instant drinks, toothpaste, cleaning and makeup products, and interface activators. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
